result: The data cleaning and harmonization task has been completed successfully. The output file data/output/cleaned_data.csv contains 16,111 rows with 7 columns: NSID, incwhh14, incwhh15, incwhhcnt14, incwhhcnt15, incwhh16, and incwhh17. All wave-specific missing value codes have been recoded to the standard scheme (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know/insufficient information, -1=Item not applicable, -3=Not asked/interviewed, -2=Script error/lost). Banded income variables (incwhh14, incwhh15) were derived from continuous income using realistic weekly household income thresholds, while categorical variables from waves 3 and 4 (incwhh16, incwhh17) were retained with their original banding schemes.
